creator: murforums@ukr.net
text:
pkg2ng fails with the error:

Checking all packages:  77%Assertion failed: (name != NULL && name[0] != '\0'), function pkg_addshlib_provided, file pkg.c, line 1291.
Child process pid=16568 terminated abnormally: Abort trap: 6

Notes:

% pkg -v
1.4.12

% uname -a
FreeBSD h-video.localdomain 8.4-RELEASE-p19 FreeBSD 8.4-RELEASE-p19 #0: Mon Nov  3 17:09:45 UTC 2014     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  i386
